response.justification: Candidate is a capable staff-level engineer with strong TypeScript and infrastructure expertise, but fundamentally misses the core requirement of 8+ years building production-grade AI solutions. Recent MCP and agentic workflow experience at re:cinq is relevant but only ~1 year old. Critically lacks Python expertise (required), vector database knowledge, RAG architecture experience, and demonstrated shipping of AI systems at scale. Could be strong in a full-stack engineer role, but not ready for staff-level AI/agent infrastructure leadership.
strengths: Currently working with MCP and agentic workflow frameworks at re:cinq—directly relevant to job's core technologies
Staff-level engineer with proven mentorship, technical leadership, and ability to build complex systems at production scale
Strong TypeScript and Node.js expertise with AWS infrastructure experience (CDK), meeting one required language and cloud platform requirements
concerns: Only ~1 year of AI/agent-specific work; job requires 8+ years building production-grade AI solutions—major gap
No Python experience listed despite it being a required language for AI/ML roles
No demonstrated expertise in vector databases, RAG architectures, or LLM performance optimization

key_factors.factor: Recent MCP and agentic workflow work
Missing Python and vector DB/RAG knowledge
